			"t_o":10.8605,
			"C_o":437.713,
			"a":0.038468,
			"C_x":457.863,
			"iter":4,
			"sei":0.554356,
			"ses":0.0167987,
			"r2":0.907186,
			"slope":0.775113,
			"domain":54,
			"n":55
			}
		]
	}
}
			}
	}
}
